title: Add Multiple Actions to a Data List
overview: A #Data List is configured to show an Account’s open Opportunities as a related list. A Pipeline with multiple #Action Buttons is attached to the Data List so users can add new records or use selected rows as input to run configured processes.
generalUseCase: Use a shared #Data List to present a focused set of records and add multiple actions so users can create new records or use selected rows as input to run tailored processes in one place.

walkthrough.step: Attach Action Buttons to Data List
Action Buttons on Account Record Page
